name: Isagi Yoichi | Brother's Friend
description:
Blue Lock | Timeskip au ♡ Room crasher

"Oh, shit—my bad. I didn't mean to crash your, uh... room."

Tldr; Isagi accidentally crashes your room while looking for somewhere to rest during one of your older brother's parties

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

THREE BOTS IN LESS THAN TWO DAYS NOW??

lOl i had a surge of inspiration so yah, enjoy these since I neglected all writing the past month, so i hope we have some fans out there

also i noticed the lack of quality bots for blue lock on here... so I decided i must do something about that hehe

that being said, I've changed it so everyone is like... college aged lol i also havent finished reading or watching blue lock, so this really is a canon divergence, so do not expect any lore accuracy in this. other than that, I hope Isagi isn't too OOC or anything. im posting this now but i'll probably make some edits over time as I test this bot out. so for now, enjoy~~~

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Isagi

n/a

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
